titleStmt.title: SII 25.21: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 21. (A.R. No. 21 of 1908.) DĀRĀŚURAM, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the first prākāra in the Airāvatēśvara temple.
This inscription is assignable to the 14th century on palaeographical grounds. The details of the date viz., 3rd regnal year and 292nd day are not sufficient for verification.

It records an order of the king issued by him from his seat called Kālingarāyaṉ in his palace at Kaṇḍiyūr in Pāṇḍikulapati-vaḷanāḍu in Śōḻamaṇḍalam granting twenty vēli of tax-free land in Teṉkuṟukkai alias Rājanārāyaṇapuram in Tirunaṟai-paṟṟu in Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu as the capital for conducting the services in the temple of Rājarāja-Īśvaram-uḍaiyanāyaṉār at Rājarājapuram, a western hamlet of Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-vaḷanādu. This order was signed by Villavarāyaṉ and others.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī komāṟapaṉmar tirupuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī vīrapāṇṭiya tevarkku yāṇṭu muṉṟāvatu nāḷ 10000 2 1000 5 100 2 10 4 ṉāl prasādam ceytaruḷiṉa tirumukappaṭi . coḻa maṇṭalattup pāṇṭikulapati vaḷanāṭṭuk kaṇṭiyūr koyil paḷḷiyaṟaik kūṭattup paḷḷippīṭaṅ kāliṅkarāyaṉil Eḻuntaruḷi IruttaRead iruntuceyta niṉaippiṉpaṭi .
kulottuṅka coḻavaḷanāṭṭu melkūṟṟu Irāja rājaThis word is extressed by symbols.purattu Uṭaiyār rājarājaThis word is extressed by symbols. Īśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil tiruppaṇikku veṇṭuvaṉavukkuṭalāka Innāṭṭu tirunaṟaiyūrppaṟṟil teṉkuṟukkaiyāṉa Irāca nārāyaṇa purattile kār maṟu viḷaiyunnilattile Irupatiṟṟu velinilam muṉṟāvatu paṅkuṉi māta mutal
mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiyiliyākak kuṭuttu Innāṉkellaiyilum tiruccūlakkallum nāṭṭivittu cantirātittavaraiyum Im mutal koṇṭu tiruppaṇiyum naṭatti Ippaṭi kallilum cempilum veṭṭivittuk koḷka Eṉṟu tiruvāy moḻintaruḷiṉapaṭikku Ivai Ikuṭi Uṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu . Ivai villa
varāyaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 25.21 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
